prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次约 64554→73772→72916→72613→92214，2025 年出现明显后移，较 2024 年大幅下降约 19601 名，近 5 年累计后移约 27660 名，整体呈波动后移趋势；2025 年基准约 92214 名；该校在广东省物理类招生计划 2021 年 44 人、2022 年 54 人、2023 年 46 人、2024 年 54 人、2025 年 85 人；2026 年计划 143 人，较 2025 年大幅扩招约 68.2%，扩招幅度显著，将明显拉低位次（位次数字增大）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 新疆大学为 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名 2026 年约第 131 名，近年排名在 127–136 之间波动，属中后段 211 院校；该校在声誉文件中无显著舆情事件记录；抖音综合热度排名第 72，评价为「一般」，短视频平台曝光量处于中等偏下水平，未出现明显报考关注升温信号；投档异常文件中无该校断档记录；第五轮学科评估中新疆大学无 A- 及以上等级学科，优势学科实力相对有限，对高分考生吸引力不强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度高热推荐，但新疆大学地处西北，相关专业对广东考生的吸引力可能弱于同分段东部高校；广东省物理类考生 2026 年约 456000 人，较 2025 年 440208 人增加约 15792 人（+3.6%），竞争略有加剧；新疆大学位于新疆乌鲁木齐，与广东省距离遥远，跨省报考的地域偏好因素对广东考生报考意愿有一定抑制作用。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次大幅后移趋势、2026 年物理类招生计划大幅扩招约 68.2%（位次数字增大）、广东省物理类考生增加约 3.6%（竞争略加剧）以及新疆大学地处西北的地域偏好因素，考虑考生总数增加带来的竞争微升，预测 2026 年物理类最低位次约 130170 名，区间 129670–130670 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 64554 → 73772 → 72916 → 72613 → 92214. In 2025, there was a significant backward shift, dropping about 19601 places compared to 2024, with a cumulative backward shift of about 27660 places over the past 5 years, showing an overall fluctuating backward trend. The baseline for 2025 is about 92214. The university's enrollment plan in Guangdong for Physics Category was 44 in 2021, 54 in 2022, 46 in 2023, 54 in 2024, and 85 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 143, a substantial expansion of about 68.2% compared to 2025, which will significantly lower the ranking (increase the ranking number).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xinjiang University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it is approximately 131st, with recent rankings fluctuating between 127 and 136, placing it in the mid-to-late segment of 211 universities. There are no significant public opinion incidents recorded in the reputation file. On Douyin, its comprehensive popularity ranking is 72, with an evaluation of 'average', indicating that short video platform exposure is at a medium-to-low level, with no clear signs of increased application interest. In the abnormal filing records, there are no records of a cutoff for this university. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Xinjiang University has no disciplines rated A- or above, so its advantageous disciplines are relatively limited in strength, making it less attractive to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly recommended in terms of social popularity. However, Xinjiang University is located in the northwest, and related majors may be less attractive to Guangdong candidates compared to universities in the eastern region at the same score segment. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Guangdong is about 456,000, an increase of about 15,792 (+3.6%) compared to 440,208 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition. Xinjiang University is located in Urumqi, Xinjiang, far from Guangdong Province, and the regional preference factor for cross-province applications has a certain inhibitory effect on the willingness of Guangdong candidates to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift trend in 2025 rankings, the substantial expansion of about 68.2% in the 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan (increasing the ranking number), the increase of about 3.6% in Guangdong Physics Category candidates (slightly intensifying competition), and the regional preference factor of Xinjiang University being located in the northwest, taking into account the slight increase in competition due to the total number of candidates, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 130170, with a range of 129670 to 130670.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 129670 to 130670, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. Due to the significant expansion in 2026, the ranking has shifted backward noticeably, so candidates can appropriately raise their expectations. Tier 1 popular engineering majors like Computer Science, Automation, and Electronic Information are highly competitive and require a ranking significantly better than the lower bound of the range. Tier 2 majors like Software Engineering and Cyberspace Security offer good value and are suitable for candidates in the middle of the range. Tier 3 majors in fields like biology, chemistry, environment, and materials are relatively easier to enter and are suitable for candidates with rankings near the upper bound of the range as a safety net.
